LanguageData.Need_Hormones_Desc: The current hormones level of the pawn. High hormones means the pawn stays calm in battle, while low hormones causes stress and panic.
LanguageData.SevereBleeding_desc: I'm losing too much blood... I feel lightheaded and terrified.
LanguageData.Physique_Description: Represents a pawn's physical fitness, cardiorespiratory endurance, stress resilience, and hormone metabolism efficiency.
